requirement_topic.en: Battery-Specific Lifecycle Regulation — No Qatar / GSO Equivalent of an EU-Style Battery Regulation
requirement_topic.zh: 电池全生命周期专项法规——卡塔尔/GSO无等同欧盟式电池法规
requirement_topic.zht: 電池全生命週期專項法規——卡塔爾/GSO無等同歐盟式電池法規

summary.en: Qatar does NOT operate an EU-style comprehensive battery lifecycle regulation. There is no Qatari or GCC-wide equivalent of Regulation (EU) 2023/1542: no mandatory battery passport, no carbon-footprint declaration, no recycled-content threshold, and no critical-mineral (cobalt / lithium / nickel / graphite) supply-chain due-diligence law for battery exporters. Instead, lithium batteries and power banks are regulated in Qatar through the general product-conformity system: QGOSM (Qatar General Organization for Standards and Metrology, under the Ministry of Commerce and Industry) administers conformity and registration for regulated products, applying GSO (GCC Standardization Organization) standards that adopt IEC texts. Where energy efficiency labelling applies to a product family, QS/GSO energy-efficiency labelling rules govern; for batteries this is generally not the operative regime. The operative obligations for a Chinese exporter are therefore safety conformity (GSO/IEC 62133), conformity assessment / registration through QGOSM where in scope, CRA approval for wireless functions, and an in-country importer — not a lifecycle battery regulation.
summary.zh: 卡塔尔不实行欧盟式电池全生命周期综合法规。卡塔尔或海湾合作委员会层面均无等同于法规（EU）2023/1542的制度：无强制电池护照、无碳足迹声明、无再生材料含量门槛，亦无针对电池出口商的关键矿产（钴/锂/镍/石墨）供应链尽职调查法律。锂电池及移动电源在卡塔尔通过一般产品合格评定体系监管：QGOSM（卡塔尔标准与计量总局，隶属商业与工业部）负责受监管产品的合格评定与注册，适用采纳IEC文本的GSO（海合会标准化组织）标准。若某产品族适用能效标签，则由QS/GSO能效标签规则管辖；电池一般不属于该体系。因此对中国出口商而言，实际义务是安全合格评定（GSO/IEC 62133）、适用范围内经QGOSM的合格评定/注册、无线功能的CRA核准及本地进口商——并非全生命周期电池法规。
summary.zht: 卡塔爾不實行歐盟式電池全生命週期綜合法規。卡塔爾或海灣合作委員會層面均無等同於法規（EU）2023/1542的制度：無強制電池護照、無碳足跡聲明、無再生材料含量門檻，亦無針對電池出口商的關鍵礦產（鈷/鋰/鎳/石墨）供應鏈盡職調查法律。鋰電池及行動電源在卡塔爾通過一般產品合格評定體系監管：QGOSM（卡塔爾標準與計量總局，隸屬商業與工業部）負責受監管產品的合格評定與登記，適用採納IEC文本的GSO（海合會標準化組織）標準。若某產品族適用能效標籤，則由QS/GSO能效標籤規則管轄；電池一般不屬於該體系。因此對中國出口商而言，實際義務是安全合格評定（GSO/IEC 62133）、適用範圍內經QGOSM的合格評定/登記、無線功能的CRA核准及本地進口商——並非全生命週期電池法規。

standards_or_laws: QGOSM (Qatar General Organization for Standards and Metrology) — conformity and registration framework for regulated products, under the Ministry of Commerce and Industry
GSO (GCC Standardization Organization) standards — regional standards adopting IEC texts, applied by QGOSM
QS / GSO energy-efficiency labelling scheme — applies to in-scope product families (generally not lithium batteries / power banks)

summary.en: China likewise does not have a single comprehensive battery lifecycle regulation matching the EU model. Portable lithium battery packs for export are primarily subject to GB 31241-2022 (safety) and, for certain rechargeable battery product categories sold domestically, mandatory CCC certification under the CNCA catalogue, plus customs import/export declarations. China's own producer-responsibility scheme for waste batteries (under the Solid Waste Pollution Prevention and Control Law and the 2021 Battery Recycling Management Measures) applies domestically. Because Qatar imposes no battery-passport, carbon-footprint, or supply-chain due-diligence regime, there is no Qatari obligation here for the Chinese baseline to be compared against — the two systems are structurally aligned in NOT having an EU-style lifecycle battery law.
summary.zh: 中国同样没有与欧盟模式对应的单一电池全生命周期综合法规。出口便携式锂电池组主要受GB 31241-2022（安全）约束，部分在国内销售的可充电电池产品类别还须依据CNCA目录取得强制性CCC认证，并办理海关进出口申报。中国自身的废旧电池生产者责任制度（《固体废物污染环境防治法》及2021年《废旧电池回收管理办法》）属国内要求。由于卡塔尔不设电池护照、碳足迹或供应链尽职调查制度，此处不存在可与中国基线对照的卡塔尔义务——两套体系在均无欧盟式全生命周期电池法这一点上结构一致。
summary.zht: 中國同樣沒有與歐盟模式對應的單一電池全生命週期綜合法規。出口便攜式鋰電池組主要受GB 31241-2022（安全）約束，部分在國內銷售的可充電電池產品類別還須依據CNCA目錄取得強制性CCC認證，並辦理海關進出口申報。中國自身的廢舊電池生產者責任制度（《固體廢物污染環境防治法》及2021年《廢舊電池回收管理辦法》）屬國內要求。由於卡塔爾不設電池護照、碳足跡或供應鏈盡職調查制度，此處不存在可與中國基線對照的卡塔爾義務——兩套體系在均無歐盟式全生命週期電池法這一點上結構一致。

standards_or_laws: GB 31241-2022 — Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in portable electronic equipment (SAC/SAMR)
CCC — China Compulsory Certification (CNCA/SAMR) — for applicable domestically-sold rechargeable battery categories
PRC Solid Waste Pollution Prevention and Control Law (2020 revision) and Battery Recycling Management Measures (2021) — domestic producer-responsibility framework

gap.en: Honest mapping: unlike the EU, Qatar imposes NO EU-style battery lifecycle obligations, so for the China-to-Qatar lane this category carries no battery-passport, carbon-footprint, recycled-content, or supply-chain due-diligence gap. The exporter's effort shifts entirely to the conformity-and-registration track: confirm whether the specific lithium battery / power bank falls within QGOSM's regulated-product scope, and if so complete the QGOSM/GSO conformity assessment and registration (covered in the market-access row), satisfy GSO/IEC 62133 safety (cell-safety row), obtain CRA type approval for wireless functions (EMC/CE row), and meet UN 38.3 transport (transport row). The practical gap is therefore procedural Gulf conformity, not the structural lifecycle obligations that dominate the EU comparison.
gap.zh: 如实对照：与欧盟不同，卡塔尔不设欧盟式电池全生命周期义务，因此在中国—卡塔尔通道中，本类别不存在电池护照、碳足迹、再生材料含量或供应链尽职调查差距。出口商的工作完全转向合格评定与注册轨道：确认具体锂电池/移动电源是否落入QGOSM受监管产品范围，若是则完成QGOSM/GSO合格评定与注册（见市场准入行）、满足GSO/IEC 62133安全（电芯安全行）、对无线功能取得CRA型号核准（EMC/CE行），并满足UN 38.3运输（运输行）。因此实际差距是程序性的海湾合格评定，而非主导欧盟对照的结构性生命周期义务。
gap.zht: 如實對照：與歐盟不同，卡塔爾不設歐盟式電池全生命週期義務，因此在中國—卡塔爾通道中，本類別不存在電池護照、碳足跡、再生材料含量或供應鏈盡職調查差距。出口商的工作完全轉向合格評定與登記軌道：確認具體鋰電池/行動電源是否落入QGOSM受監管產品範圍，若是則完成QGOSM/GSO合格評定與登記（見市場准入行）、滿足GSO/IEC 62133安全（電芯安全行）、對無線功能取得CRA型號核准（EMC/CE行），並滿足UN 38.3運輸（運輸行）。因此實際差距是程序性的海灣合格評定，而非主導歐盟對照的結構性生命週期義務。

mandatory_status.target: No EU-style battery lifecycle regulation in Qatar — no battery passport, carbon-footprint, recycled-content, or supply-chain due-diligence obligation; the operative mandatory controls are QGOSM/GSO conformity and registration (where in scope), GSO/IEC 62133 safety, CRA wireless approval, UN 38.3, and an in-country importer
mandatory_status.cn: Not applicable in equivalent form — China also has no EU-style lifecycle battery regulation; domestic controls are GB 31241 safety, applicable CCC certification, and customs declaration

source.publisher: Qatar General Organization for Standards and Metrology (QGOSM), Ministry of Commerce and Industry

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] For China-to-Qatar, there is no EU-style battery lifecycle regulation to satisfy: Qatar imposes no battery passport, carbon-footprint declaration, recycled-content threshold, or critical-mineral supply-chain due-diligence on lithium battery / power bank exporters. The real compliance work sits in QGOSM/GSO conformity and registration, GSO/IEC 62133 safety, CRA wireless type approval, UN 38.3 transport, and the in-country importer obligation. Chinese GB 31241 or CCC documentation does not by itself establish Qatari conformity.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 就中国—卡塔尔而言，不存在须满足的欧盟式电池全生命周期法规：卡塔尔不对锂电池/移动电源出口商设定电池护照、碳足迹声明、再生材料含量门槛或关键矿产供应链尽职调查。真正的合规工作在于QGOSM/GSO合格评定与注册、GSO/IEC 62133安全、CRA无线型号核准、UN 38.3运输及本地进口商义务。中国GB 31241或CCC文件本身不能确立卡塔尔符合性。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 就中國—卡塔爾而言，不存在須滿足的歐盟式電池全生命週期法規：卡塔爾不對鋰電池/行動電源出口商設定電池護照、碳足跡聲明、再生材料含量門檻或關鍵礦產供應鏈盡職調查。真正的合規工作在於QGOSM/GSO合格評定與登記、GSO/IEC 62133安全、CRA無線型號核准、UN 38.3運輸及本地進口商義務。中國GB 31241或CCC文件本身不能確立卡塔爾符合性。
